heading: Working capital fund; credit card refunds or rebates
label: 1467a Working capital fund; credit card refunds or rebates
text: Refunds or rebates received on an on-going basis from a credit card services provider under the Department of the Interior’s charge card programs, on and after , may be deposited to and retained without fiscal year limitation in the Departmental Working Capital Fund established under and used to fund management initiatives of general benefit to the Department of the Interior’s bureaus and offices as determined by the Secretary or his designee.October 11, 200043 U.S.C. 1467
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in the following prior appropriation act:, , , 1501A–159.Pub. L. 106–113, div. B, § 1000(a)(3) [title I, § 118]113 Stat. 1535Nov. 29, 1999
